# Ipe Specification Materials

This folder contains selected documentation files from the Ipe repository:

<https://github.com/otfried/ipe>

The files are included as background material for implementing a clean-room Ipe
XML importer. They are not implementation source and should not be copied into
the converter code.

Fetched paths:

- `README.md`
- `doc/gpl.txt`
- `doc/install.txt`
- `doc/ipe.dtd`
- `doc/macos.txt`
- `manual/10_ipe_files.rst`
- `manual/30_objects.rst`
- `manual/60_stylesheets.rst`
- `manual/90_file_format.rst`
- `manual/94_commandline_programs.rst`
- `man/ipeextract.1`
- `man/iperender.1`
- `man/ipetoipe.1`

Ipe is copyright Otfried Cheong and is distributed under the GNU GPL. See
`doc/gpl.txt` in this folder for the license text from upstream.
